subcodes.first_line: ...In the beginning of every Revelation adversities have prevailed, which later on have been turned into great prosperity
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
